goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 18:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 18:15 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should go to birmingham new street
Make sure you get train ID and price
